title: DAClearLag
description: The DAClearLag mod is a Minecraft mod for servers using Fabric, designed to improve performance by automatically removing ground objects at regular intervals. It is inspired by the well-known Bukkit plugin “ClearLagg”.
body:
**🔧 Intelligent server optimization! 🔧
**
Boost your performance with this revolutionary mod that automatically cleans up objects on the floor every 5 

minutes, preventing excessive accumulation of useless entities. But don't panic! An alert is broadcast 30 

seconds before deletion, allowing you to recover your precious objects before they disappear.

🌍 Multi-world compatibility ensures smooth, consistent item management, no matter what universe you're in.

**🔥 Why adopt this mod? 🔥**

✅ Increased performance: Reduces server load by eliminating superfluous entities.  

✅ Enhanced security: Warnings before deletion to avoid any loss of objects.  

✅ Total automation: Operates autonomously, with no need for manual commands.

🚀 Mod Loader: **Fabric** 
🛠 Version: **1.20.1**

This mod guarantees a smoother, faster and better organized server. Efficient management for optimized gameplay!
